objective: Make the LifeMax public app visibly more functional and credible by adding a browser-local experiment decision loop that turns observations into a local keep/adjust/drop/inconclusive decision, preserves truth boundaries, proves the flow locally and in production, and checkpoints remaining backend/shared-context blockers.
riskClass: Q2 app/frontend product-functionality upgrade with Q3 production deployment already approved by PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote
completion_blocker: The public app slice is deployed and smoke-tested, but the separate LifeMax lab/shared-context boot packet remains red, so this cannot be claimed as full LifeMax daily usability.

changes.summary: Adds browser-local experiment decisions, decision export status, observation signal counts, and honest next-action summaries.
Adds an Experiment decision panel, saves a local decision note, creates a local memory candidate, updates result copy, and discloses decision-note storage in Privacy.
Adds compact decision-panel styling consistent with existing operational UI.
Covers active observation counts and saved experiment decision derivation/export.
Covers observation logging, decision save, result panel, memory count changes, export preview, and screenshot proof.

functional_flows_proven: Experiment builder unlocks after local check-in and capture evidence.
Active experiment accepts a manual observation and shows signal counts.
Experiment decision can be saved as keep/adjust/drop/inconclusive with a local note.
Saved decision changes the result panel and persists after refresh.
Saved decision creates a browser-local memory candidate visible from Today.
Profile export preview includes experiment_decision and the decision note.
Privacy states that the local experiment decision note is browser-local.
truth_boundaries_preserved: No reminders, external sends, AI coaching, dosage automation, medical decisioning, or backend writes are claimed.
Experiment decisions are browser-local notes only.
Decision copy avoids causal, readiness, recovery, strain, or medical claims.
WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, and backend writes remain explicitly unconnected.

checks.details: First failed on ambiguous status locator; second failed on replaced success status; repaired both and final rerun passed 2 Playwright visual tests.
No matches for common token/secret patterns

targets.name: omega
proved: Privacy route and local decision-note copy

targets.name: lifemax-web
proved: Privacy route and local decision-note copy

loop_evidence.result: Found the highest visible gap in Experiments: observations could be logged and stopped, but no explicit local decision fed back into memory/export.
Added local experiment decision data, UI, memory candidate creation, export status, and privacy disclosure.

defects_found: Visual smoke had an ambiguous role=status locator after adding a second status message.
Visual smoke expected a transient success status after the active panel was replaced by the result panel.
First production smoke attempted an unnecessary Patterns shortcut and timed out before the target decision flow.
repairs_made: Scoped observation status assertion to the log form.
Changed decision proof to assert the persistent result panel instead of a transient status.
Changed production smoke to start the experiment from the Experiments builder after check-in/capture, matching the supported user path.
checks_rerun: production Playwright smoke on both aliases

residual_risks: This remains browser-local demo functionality only.
No real backend, WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, or Postgres integration was connected or verified.
Lab boot/preflight remains red and blocks full LifeMax daily-usability completion.
Vercel reported 2 moderate npm audit findings during remote install; no dependency changes were made in this slice.
Screenshots are local ignored artifacts and referenced by path rather than committed binary files.
next_exact_action: Commit and push this independently verified proof packet, inspect public aliases after the proof-only push, then continue either with another visible browser-local product workflow or the separate lab shared-context/MCP repair lane.

independent_verification.summary: Independent quality_verifier accepted the experiment-decision public-app slice as a proven checkpoint and rejected broader COMPLETE status because the lab/shared-context boot packet and preflight remain red.
rerun_evidence: npm run test:fixtures pass: 1 file, 2 tests
npm run test:pwa pass: 1 file, 1 test
npm run screenshot:mobile pass: 2 Playwright tests
vercel inspect pass: life-max-omega and lifemax-web aliases Ready on proof-packet deployment IDs
fresh headless production smoke pass on both aliases: observation, decision save, refresh persistence, Today memory, Profile export preview, Privacy disclosure
no console/page/HTTP 500 errors reported by verifier
blocker_evidence: Lab boot packet safe_to_claim_daily_usable is false.
Local preflight is red: MCP health unknown, get_life_safety_state did not load, and get_grok_context_brief did not load.
Full LifeMax daily usability still requires green shared-context/backend/public-MCP/Grok proof.
independent_verification.stop_continue_decision: Continue as CHECKPOINT. Do not claim COMPLETE until the lab/shared-context lane is green.
